sourcesContent:
Template Dashboard

Choose the right resume template before you edit.

Filter templates by role, experience, layout, style, ATS compatibility, and premium access. Then preview before entering the editor.

Back to dashboard

All Templates

{{ templates.length }} templates found

Smart filters active
No templates match the current filters. Adjust role, experience, layout, style, or premium toggle.
import { Component, OnInit } from '@angular/core'; import { ResumeTemplate } from '../../../core/models/resume.model'; import { ResumeService } from '../../../core/services/resume.service'; import { TemplateFilterState } from '../template-filter-sidebar/template-filter-sidebar.component'; @Component({ selector: 'app-template-list', templateUrl: './template-list.component.html' }) export class TemplateListComponent implements OnInit { templates: ResumeTemplate[] = []; loading = true; search = ''; filters: TemplateFilterState = { role: 'developer', experience: 'mid', layout: '', style: '', category: '', isAts: true, premiumOnly: false }; constructor(private readonly resumeService: ResumeService) { } ngOnInit(): void { this.loadTemplates(); } get recommendedTemplates(): ResumeTemplate[] { return this.templates.filter((template) => template.roleType === 'developer' && (template.experienceLevel === 'mid' || template.experienceLevel === 'senior') ).slice(0, 3); } onFiltersChange(filters: TemplateFilterState): void { this.filters = filters; this.loadTemplates(); } onSearchChange(): void { this.loadTemplates(); } private loadTemplates(): void { this.loading = true; this.resumeService.getTemplatesFiltered({ search: this.search || undefined, role: this.filters.role || undefined, experience: this.filters.experience || undefined, layout: this.filters.layout || undefined, style: this.filters.style || undefined, category: this.filters.category || undefined, isAts: this.filters.isAts, premium: this.filters.premiumOnly ? true : undefined }).subscribe({ next: (templates) => { this.templates = templates; this.loading = false; }, error: () => { this.loading = false; } }); } }
